name: Smooth Mood Mini Games
description: Stressed out to the max? Pop, squish & squeeze your worries like never before with AntiStress Fidget Toys set:a virtual pocket-sized arsenal of 100+ stress-busting satisfying toys satisfying pops of colorful Pop Its & simple dimples, squishy delights of stress balls to the mesmerizing melodies of Pop Tubes and the ASMR magic of soap cutting, AntiStress Fidget. Unique Squeeze, stretch, and squish stress balls, squishy toys, having different animations and slimes of every texture and color for tactile gratification.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
